title: stdlib-docs — generated module-page frontmatter (Regime B)
description: The robust, machine-processable frontmatter schema for the GENERATED per-module reference pages (docs/modules/<module>.md) in m-stdlib / v-stdlib. This is the Regime-B contract (see docs/background/docs-governance-two-regimes-adr.md): the per-module pages are machine output, NOT prose docs, and are governed by this schema + the stdlib-docs drift gates, not the doc-framework prose validator. Validated by tools/check-frontmatter.py (make check-frontmatter). One schema serves both stdlibs; per-repo fields are optional.

module.description: The routine/module name; STD* (m-stdlib) or VSL* (v-stdlib). MUST equal the filename stem upper-cased.

layer.description: The m/v waterline layer (m = engine-neutral, v = VistA-specific). Emitted by v-stdlib; optional in m-stdlib (its layer is m by repo).

synopsis.description: One-line module summary from the routine header.

labels.description: Public label names exposed by the module (from the manifest).

errors.description: U-<MOD>* error codes the module's public labels raise (from the manifest).

since.description: Version the module first shipped in (may be empty until the lib tags a release).

tag.description: m-stdlib: the release tag this module shipped in (from index.md).

phase.description: m-stdlib: the roadmap phase grouping (from index.md).

conformance.description: m-stdlib: conformance-corpus paths exercising this module, or [].

created.description: ISO date the page was created.

last_modified.description: ISO date of the last material change.
